title: The Paper That Boots Python
tagline: A printed square makes any phone cold-boot real Python in two seconds.
holy_shit: A square of ink makes any phone run real CPython in two seconds — no App Store, no server — and the code is hash-verified before it executes.
powered_by: /vbrainstem-cell (CPython 3.12 boots headless in a sandboxed iframe)
agent_scenario: When you need a full language runtime on a device with nothing installed, delivered by a scannable trigger.
author: kody-w + Claude
